## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation

Describe the problem or use case that this feature would address. Why is it needed?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see. Include any API changes or examples if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.
